post.description: Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access/refresh token pair.
Send an OTP code to the given mobile number.
Verify OTP code and return access/refresh tokens.

get.description: Return type-ahead suggestions for snippets, tags, and/or projects.

post.description: Create a new folder within a project.

get.description: Get a single folder with its children and snippets.

delete.description: Soft-delete a folder (cascades to children and snippets).

get.description: List all projects for the authenticated user.

post.description: Create a new project for the authenticated user.

get.description: Get a single project with its folders and snippets.

delete.description: Soft-delete a project (cascades to folders and snippets).

get.description: Full-text search across the user's snippets via Meilisearch.
List snippets owned by the authenticated user with optional filters.

post.description: Create a new snippet, optionally syncing tags.

get.description: List snippets belonging to a specific project.
Get a single snippet with its tags.

put.description: Update an existing snippet and sync its tags.

get.description: List all tags for the authenticated user.

post.description: Create a new tag for the authenticated user.

put.description: Update an existing tag's name or color.

delete.description: Delete a tag (detaches from all snippets).

post.description: Attach a tag to a snippet.

delete.description: Detach a tag from a snippet.

get.description: List all soft-deleted items (projects, folders, snippets) for the user.

delete.description: Permanently delete all trashed items belonging to the authenticated user.

post.description: Restore a soft-deleted item by type and ID.

delete.description: Permanently delete a trashed item by type and ID.
